title: Fix Codex codereview slash command
description: The custom /codereview command exists as a loose prompt file under ~/.codex/prompts, but Codex 0.142.3 does not register it as a slash command. Move or wrap it in the supported plugin commands surface and verify the command is recognized.
notes: Attempted supported surfaces for /codereview in Codex 0.142.3. Installed a validated personal plugin with commands/codereview.md; mirrored prompt to ~/.codex/commands and ~/.claude/commands; drove externalAgentConfig/detect over app-server; and tested a local MCP prompt server. Fresh TUI still lists only built-ins for /c and direct /codereview returns: Unrecognized command '/codereview'. Type '/' for a list of supported commands. Conclusion: this Codex TUI build does not load user/plugin/MCP prompts as slash commands; /codereview cannot be made a supported slash command via config in 0.142.3.
